THE CLERK OF THE COURT IS ORDERED TO ISSUE COMMISSIONS AUTHORIZING SUBPOENAS FOR RECORDS FROM LUXOR HOTEL, UNIVERSITY OF NEVADA, LAS VEGAS, AND PRIMM VALLEY RESORTS FOR THE FOLLOWING EMPLOYMENT RECORDS OF PLAINTIFF: APPLICATION / RESUME; PAYROLL RECORDS, INCLUDING SALARY, WAGES, COMMISSIONS OR OTHER RENUMERATION PAID OR HELD BY THE EMPLOYER, W-2 FORMS, TIME SHEETS, AND RECORDS OF TIME OFF THE JOB AND REASONS THEREFORE, INCLUDING SICK LEAVE AND VACATION. MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John H. Aspelin for plaintiff and moving party
An H. Nguyen for defendant and opposing party
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modifications: Plaintiff's motion to quash and modify subpoenas is granted in part and denied in part. The subpoenas for medical records from the University of California, Davis and Dr. Fowle are modified to only require production from the date plaintiff commenced enrollment with defendant.

The subpoena for employment records from Apple Computers shall be modified to only require production of the following records: plaintiff's employment application; resume; payroll records, including salary, wages, commissions or other forms of renumeration paid by or held by the employer; W-2's and / or 1099's, timesheets or other records of time worked; records of time off work and the reasons therefore, including sick leave or vacation, [and documents relating to plaintiff's separation from employment, whether voluntary or involuntary, and any reasons for it. Plaintiff's social security number shall be redacted from the records produced.

MODIFICATIONS: to exclude billing records and to specify production is for records fom Nov-1-1099. Production to take place by May-20-2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
